subtitle.login: Welcome back! Enter credentials to continue your journey.
subtitle.register: Start your smart planning companion in less than a minute.
subtitle.forgot: Enter your registered email below, and we will send you recovery instructions.
subtitle.reset: Please enter a new password and confirm to reset your credentials.
subtitle.verify: Please verify your email address to unlock full traveler capabilities and AI features.

labels.acceptTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

toast.recoverySentDesc: We've sent a secure password recovery link to {{email}}.
toast.requestFailedDesc: Could not send password recovery instructions.
toast.verifiedSuccessDesc: Your email address has been successfully verified. Logging you in...
toast.verifiedFailedDesc: The verification link was invalid or expired.
toast.linkSentDesc: We've sent a new verification link to {{email}}. Please check your inbox.
toast.linkSentFailedDesc: An error occurred while sending the verification email.
toast.registerSuccessDesc: Your account has been created. Please verify your email.
toast.sessionExpiredDesc: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
toast.passwordResetSuccessDesc: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
toast.verificationPendingDesc: Your email has not been verified yet. Please verify to continue.
toast.googleLoginSuccessDesc: You have successfully signed in using Google.
toast.googleLoginFailedDesc: An unexpected error occurred during Google Sign-in.
toast.rateLimitDesc: Too many login attempts. Inputs locked for {{seconds}}s.
toast.authAlertRemainingAttempts: Caution: {{attempts}} attempts remaining before account lockout.
toast.authAlertAccountLocked: Account Locked. Please use Reset Password below to recover access.
toast.accountAlreadyExistsDesc: This email is already registered and verified. Please sign in to continue.
toast.registrationFailedDesc: An unexpected error occurred during account creation.
toast.tokenMissingDesc: Security Token is missing or invalid. Please check your recovery email or request a new reset link.
toast.passwordUpdatedSuccessDesc: Your credentials have been successfully updated. Logging you in...
toast.passwordResetFailedDesc: An error occurred while resetting your password.

screens.recoverySent: We've sent a secure password recovery link to your email. Please follow the instructions to reset your password.
screens.verifySuccess: Congratulations! Your traveler profile is fully verified. You can now enjoy the complete travel companion intelligence suite.
screens.verifyExpired: Verification expired. For security reasons, email confirmation links are only valid for 15 minutes.
screens.verifyFailed: The verification link was expired, invalid, or has already been used.
screens.verifyPending: We have sent an authorization link to: {{email}}. Please click the link inside your email to proceed.
screens.verifyPendingInstructions: Check your email inbox. If you cannot find it, you can request a resend below.
screens.resetSuccessDesc: Your credentials have been successfully updated. You have been automatically logged in and are being redirected to your traveler dashboard.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordStrength: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character.
validation.enterprisePasswordStrength: Password must contain at least 12 characters, including one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.fullNameInvalid: Full name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes.
validation.agreeTermsRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
validation.phoneInvalid: Phone number is invalid. Must be 9 to 10 digits after the country code (+84).

sessionTimeout.title: Session Expiring Soon
sessionTimeout.description: You have been inactive for a while. For security, your session will automatically lock in:
